.view-header-title.box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72), inset 0 -1px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--ogd-rim-active-low) 34%, transparent), 0 1px 5px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05)

pre.box-shadow: var(--ogd-codeblock-shadow, inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88), inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06), 0 12px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.09))

pre:has(> code.language-mermaid).box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 var(--ogd-codeblock-rim, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88)), inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06), 0 14px 28px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.10)
